dependency_installation_method: pip install from requirements.phase1.txt-equivalent targeted runtime dependency set; full freeze captured in artifacts/pip_freeze.txt

available.libsndfile1: not probed separately on macOS host

important_runtime_assumptions: Phase-1 validated the Hugging Face AutoModel path on CPU fallback because no visible GPU was available on the host.
HF_HOME and HF_HUB_CACHE must point to model-local directories to keep secondary downloads reproducible.
The upstream custom code monkey-patches scipy.inf = numpy.inf before importing msaf-dependent code paths; standalone msaf import fails without that compatibility shim on scipy 1.15.2.
